case_for: Thielen has posted two huge weeks (23.9 and 19.2) in his last three outings, showing his role in the offense can produce spike weeks well above the threshold.
case_against: The pregame consensus projection of 10.1 points sits below the 12.0 threshold and his most recent game (10.1) and week 12 (8.7) show he can easily fall short when volume dips.
